name: Surfers Coffee
tagline: Non-profit coffee shop run by Surfing The Nations — great espresso with an even better mission.
talkStory: Run by Surfing The Nations, a nonprofit doing humanitarian work across the Pacific for over 20 years — tsunami relief, youth outreach, and surf therapy for at-risk kids. Every cup directly funds these missions. The coffee is solid, with beans from Hawaiian farms. Located in Wahiawa, dead center between Honolulu and the North Shore, it’s the perfect pit stop on the drive up. The vibe is warm and community-oriented — you might end up hearing about their latest project.
